Test Case: PHASE 1 — OPERATIONAL ACCEPTANCE TESTING: Master Data + Setup
App installs cleanly on fresh bench
Steps: bench get-app production_log; bench --site [site] install-app production_log
Expected Result: No errors. App listed in installed apps

Steps: After install, check Production Stage list
Expected Result: 10 seed records present. All Custom Fields installed on Workstation Type, Workstation, and 3 job card types

Test Case: App installs on existing site with job card data
Steps: Install on a site that already has Job Card Label/Carton/Computer Paper records
Expected Result: Install succeeds. Existing job cards gain production_status=Not Started and current_stage=blank. No data loss

Steps: bench --site [site] migrate
Expected Result: Zero errors. All doctypes created, Custom Fields applied

Steps: Run bench migrate twice in a row
Expected Result: Second run produces no errors and no duplicate records

Steps: Open Production Stage list with 10+ records, measure load time
Expected Result: Page load < 1 second

Test Case: Workstation list loads under 1s with custom fields
Steps: Open Workstation list with 20+ records, measure load time
Expected Result: Page load < 1 second. Custom columns visible in list view

Steps: Open a Workstation document with 5 Workstation Stage child rows
Expected Result: Form load < 1 second

Steps: Run bench update on the site
Expected Result: Custom Fields still present on all target doctypes. No fields removed

Test Case: Deleting a Production Stage blocked if referenced
Steps: Create a Workstation Stage row referencing a Production Stage, then try to delete that Production Stage
Expected Result: Frappe blocks deletion with LinkExistsError

Test Case: Deleting a Waste Reason blocked if referenced (future)
Steps: Attempt to delete a Waste Reason that will be referenced by Production Entry in Phase 2
Expected Result: Deletion should be blocked once Production Entry references exist. For now, deletion allowed (no references yet) — note for Phase 2 re-test

Test Case: Workstation Type deletion blocked if Workstations exist
Steps: Create a Workstation under Flexo Press type, then try deleting Flexo Press Workstation Type
Expected Result: Frappe blocks deletion — child Workstation records exist

Steps: Run bench --site [site] backup, inspect SQL dump
Expected Result: Tables for Production Stage, Workstation Stage, Waste Reason, Downtime Reason present in backup

Steps: Restore backup to a fresh site
Expected Result: All master data, custom fields, and seed records intact

Test Case: Non-authenticated user cannot access new doctypes
Steps: Hit /api/resource/Production Stage without login
Expected Result: 403 Forbidden

Test Case: Guest role has no access to new doctypes
Steps: Login as Guest, try to access Production Stage list
Expected Result: Permission denied

Steps: Login as Production Log User, call /api/resource/Production Stage/Printing
Expected Result: Returns read-only data. No write endpoints accessible

Steps: Install and migrate on Frappe v15 bench
Expected Result: All doctypes created, custom fields applied, no deprecation errors

Steps: Verify ERPNext Workstation and Workstation Type forms show custom fields
Expected Result: Custom fields appear after ERPNext standard fields. No conflicts

Test Case: No JS console errors on any new form
Steps: Open each new doctype form, check browser console
Expected Result: Zero JS errors

Steps: bench --site [site] uninstall-app production_log
Expected Result: Production Stage, Workstation Stage, Waste Reason, Downtime Reason tables removed

Steps: After uninstall, open Workstation form
Expected Result: Custom fields (product_line, max_width_mm, etc.) no longer present

Test Case: App uninstall does not remove Workstation Type records
Steps: After uninstall, check Workstation Type list
Expected Result: Flexo Press etc. still exist (they are data records, not schema)

Test Case: Existing job cards unaffected after uninstall
Steps: After uninstall, open a Job Card Label
Expected Result: Form loads normally. production_status and current_stage fields gone. No errors
